name: Lingon
description: Lingon helps you learn Swedish by reading real news from SVT, TV4, and Expressen. Three reading modes let you adjust as you go — full translations, side-by-side, or Swedish only.

features.title: Three Reading Modes
features.description: Read in Swedish only, with translations, or side-by-side. Swipe to switch anytime.

features.title: Built-in Dictionary
features.description: Long-press any word to look it up. No app-switching needed.

features.title: AI Simplification
features.description: Tap Simplify to rewrite any article in shorter sentences with everyday vocabulary.

features.title: Chat Tutor
features.description: Ask questions about grammar, vocabulary, or anything in the article you're reading.

features.title: Read Aloud
features.description: Hear articles spoken in Swedish. Pro users get five voice options and speed control.

features.title: On-Device Translation
features.description: Translations run on-device by default. Pro subscribers get cloud translations as a fallback.

faq.question: What language does Lingon teach?
faq.answer: Lingon is designed for learning Swedish. Articles come from SVT, TV4, and Expressen. Translations are available in English, Chinese, Arabic, French, and German.

faq.question: Do I need an internet connection?
faq.answer: You need internet to fetch news articles. Translations use Apple's on-device models when available, so they work without sending data to external servers.

faq.question: What devices are supported?
faq.answer: Lingon requires an iPhone running iOS 26.2 or later.

faq.question: What does the Pro subscription include?
faq.answer: Pro subscribers get unlimited articles, cloud translations via Gemini API as a fallback, unlimited AI chat messages, five Swedish TTS voices with speed control, and unlimited saved articles.

faq.question: How do I look up a word?
faq.answer: Long-press any word in an article to bring up the built-in iOS dictionary.

faq.question: How do I restore my subscription?
faq.answer: Open the app, go to Settings, tap Premium, then tap Restore Purchases at the bottom of the screen.

privacy: Lingon respects your privacy. Translations are processed on-device using Apple Foundation Models whenever possible. Your saved articles, reading preferences, and settings are stored locally on your device. No account or sign-in is required. The app fetches news articles from public RSS feeds (SVT, TV4, Expressen). Firebase is used to deliver pre-translated article data. Pro subscribers may have article text sent to Google's Gemini API for translation and AI chat — only the article text is sent, no personal information. Subscription purchases are handled by Apple through StoreKit. Lingon does not include advertising, does not use tracking frameworks, and does not collect personal data. Deleting the app removes all stored data. For privacy questions, contact chengdai.dev@gmail.com.
